title: pappobolus acutifolia
intro: Pappobolus acutifolia is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, Asteraceae, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Pappobolus acutifolia is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures or salves.
